response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ experience in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; while they have brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 at National Instruments, there is no evidence of recent, sustained C++ development, STL usage, multi-threading, or IEC 62443 security practices required for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience with modern web and cloud technologies (Node.js, TypeScript, AWS, Kubernetes)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and code kata
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across domains (GIS, IoT, automation) with a focus on testability and performance
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience in the last 9 years
Lacks demonstrated expertise in industrial protocols (MQTT, OPC UA, IEC 61850), SDL, or IEC 62443 standards
No evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or message-broker-based industrial platform design
